review_title: Great Time tracker for small team
description: I have a Small Web Agency with a small team size, and my full team is remote, so i was looking for a tracking solution for my agency, and also I already talked with some developers, and the price was too much. then i was doing research on it and I found Deklog And as I said, my team size is small, and I was looking for an affordable solution and i saw some trackers, but all were expensive for me, and then finally i found Deklog. before buying it, I was afraid that I would get my job done with this budget or not. but after buying it, it surprised me. what an amazing product, and great tracking function, specially the productivity time tracking. now i can track my team's productivity with the screenshot function; it makes my team tracking more efficient. and I had some issues after purchasing it and opened a support ticket, and the ticket response was fast and very friendly. Love the Dekslog team energy. Thank you, Dekslog, for such a great product.
author: Web M.
pros: Mostly I like the screenshot and app activity time tracking function; it gives me more real-life work tracking proof
cons: The dashboard can be more user-friendly. When I log in on the dashboard, it's showing me a popup for onboarding but I've already done the onboarding but still it's showing again and again, which is not user-friendly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Desklog is a Must for Remote Teams
description: Desklog has been helping our leadership team monitor our team members and track the time spent on specific projects so we can better quote new projects in the future.
author: William M.
pros: Desklog is a great platform for any remote business with full-time/part-time employees. I like that you can turn on and turn off certain features for specific users so its less confusing to my team members.
cons: The UI can take a few seconds to load but otherwise its been solid for us so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Effective Tool For Work Time Management
author: Jeseena K.
pros: It was very useful during the pandemic to track time effectively and it has user-friendly interface so that anyone can understand the features easily.
cons: More customized attendance reports can be implemented.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Great time tracker without getting in the way
description: I've tested out various time tracking software and this is by far the easiest to use. The desktop application can't get any simpler, it just tracks your time as soon as you start your computer. I haven't had a single connection issue so far, so what more could you ask for?
author: Melvin R.
pros: It's easy to set up, a clear and concise web interface and it just does the job without getting in the way.
cons: It would be nice to have an option to add manual entries in case you forgot to install the software, or when you're working without a computer.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Desklog: Best Option for Timetracking
description: We tried several time tracking software subscriptions before stumbling on Desklog. I am not a fan of monthly subscriptions and the free versions of the more popular options just didn't cut it. Desklog has been exactly what we need with bonus features. This is a product we can grow into and at a one time price. I'm looking forward to seeing what else they have in store for the software but if they simply kept it as is and maintained it, it would be a great alternative to the other options on the market. The best feature for me is that I can set it all up and it just works. The set up was easy! I also love the automatic time logging feature, remembering to start and stop a timer when working on projects is not feasible for me.
author: Hailey W.
pros: The simplicity of use, easy setup and ability to start using it from day one without a huge learning curve.
cons: The only thing that is a minor inconvenience is that you can't input time manually.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good and cost efficient time tracking solution.
description: As I stated above, the experience is positive. The solution fulfills me needs for team time tracking solution.
author: Ľudo J.
pros: I started to use desklog as a cheaper alternative to our previous time tracking app. It was not only cheaper but provided cost/revenue analysis and a nicer user interface. The support response was also great.
cons: The solution missing automatic project change based on criteria like browsed web url/title. I would also wellcome a small widget, which would indicate, what project/task is currently tracked.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Perfect for our business!

pros: It has great features that work perfectly for our business, we cannot wait to roll this out across the company - Thank you!
cons: Everything is great, no complaints and we have been using it daily

review_title: Best time tracking software
description: I have purchased the best deal ever and that is Desklog. This is so far the best and surely value for money. Their support is so fast! I asked for upgration to Enterprise plan for the App Activity tracking. I knocked them, then they immediately replied, and upgraded my account for free. That's awesome! Hoping that you guys will bring more features in upcoming days. Best of luck, team Desklog.

pros: Their support, I must say it. They are very much responsive to solve any issue.
cons: Adding an email when adding a new client. This is required but I do not think this should be required.

review_title: A Simple Way to Increase Team Productivity with Automatic Time Tracking
description: It's a solid tool for monitoring employee work time, which helps us better manage team time and increase productivity. Automatic time tracking is the most important benefit for me. Despite minor shortcomings, I recommend Desklog to any company looking for an effective way to monitor work time and manage projects.
author: Tomasz K.
pros: I really appreciate how easy it is to monitor my work time – the interface is intuitive and everything is readily accessible. Plus, the Windows and Android apps allow me to track progress and manage my time no matter where I am. It also has many features like project time management, task assignment, and time-based billing, so if I need them in the future, Desklog will be a great fit.
cons: Simplifying the interface would make it more intuitive. Displaying time in a 24-hour format would be more convenient, and more transparent privacy policies would increase user trust.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best and Amazing platform for business management
description: I can quickly identify where time is being spent and make adjustments where needed, which has helped optimize our workflow. If you’re searching for an effective, user-friendly time tracking solution, I’d definitely recommend giving Desklog a try.
author: Mahesh S.
pros: My experience with Desklog has been really positive. From day one, it made managing my team’s time and tasks so much easier. The automated timesheets are a real time-saver, and the productivity tracking feature gives me clear insights into how efficiently the team is working. It’s simple to use and takes the hassle out of tracking time and keeping things organized.
cons: Since using Desklog, I’ve noticed a significant improvement in both our efficiency and productivity.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Powerful and Intuitive Project Management Tool
description: My overall experience with Desklog has been very positive. It is an excellent tool for managing teams and projects efficiently. The intuitive design makes it easy to onboard new team members quickly. Its robust tracking and reporting systems help maintain transparency and accountability within the team. I highly recommend Desklog to anyone looking for a reliable project management solution.
author: Hamza E.
pros: One of the most impressive features of Desklog is its user-friendly interface that allows for seamless navigation and use. Time tracking and project management tools are very effective. They integrate well with existing workflows, increasing productivity and keeping teams organized. Additionally, the detailed reporting functionalities offer great insights into project progress and team efficiency. To top it off, I can make sure my team is working on the right things.
cons: While Desklog provides excellent features, the customization options could be expanded further to cater to specific business needs more extensively. However, the existing functionalities sufficiently meet my business requirements.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Tracker tout automatique
author: Emmanuelle R.
pros: Tracking automatique du temps sur les applications et URL, calcul des heures facturables, service client réactif
cons: Pas grand chose à reprocher. S'il faut chipoter, on peut améliorer l'interface utilisateur pour la rendre plus simple
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Success
author: Blake F.
pros: One of the most impressive aspects of Desklog was its user-friendliness. It didn't take much time for our team members to adapt to the software. The intuitive interface made it easy to log working hours, switch between projects, and generate reports. The real-time tracking feature was particularly helpful as it allowed us to monitor progress and make necessary adjustments on the fly.
cons: While Desklog met most of our needs, there are a few areas where we believe it could be improved. Firstly, integration with other project management and task tracking tools would be beneficial. Seamless integration with popular tools like Jira or Trello would eliminate the need for double data entry.Additionally, more robust mobile applications would be appreciated. While the desktop version worked excellently, having equally powerful mobile apps would make it easier for our team members who are often on the move.Lastly, enhanced reporting features, including predictive analytics based on historical data, could provide even more valuable insights into time management and resource allocation.In conclusion, Desklog has been a valuable addition to our IT franchise brand. Its ease of use and flexibility have significantly improved our time tracking and management processes. While there is room for improvement, it has certainly been a step in the right direction for our organization.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: I must have for anyone that runs a remote team

pros: Basically the simplicity of setup and ease of implementation.
cons: I don't think that there were any cones, but I would like to see a chat function as part of it in the future.

review_title: A Game-Changing Lifetime Deal with Exceptional Customer Support
description: I recently purchased a plan from Desklog.io through AppSumo, and it's been a fantastic deal. The lifetime access they offer is a great short-term saving and a smart long-term investment for our needs. Their immediate and efficient customer service support has made the experience even more enjoyable. Overall, I'm happy with my decision to deal with Desklog.io
author: Nam L.
pros: What I liked most about Desklog.io was its simplicity. The user interface is clean and straightforward, making it easy for our team to adopt and use without any steep learning curves. This simplicity not only saves time but also enhances productivity, making it a valuable tool for our business.
cons: At the moment, I haven't encountered any issues or drawbacks with Desklog.io. However, if I come across anything in the future, I will definitely come back and mention it in my review. So far, it's been a smooth and positive experience
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Appreciation Feedback of Desklog
author: Ed V.
pros: Desklog impressed us with its user-friendly interface and comprehensive features. The ability to track time both in-office and remotely was a significant advantage, especially given the challenges posed by the COVID-19 pandemic. The software's real-time monitoring capabilities and the option to capture screenshots for remote employees ensured accountability and transparency. Additionally, the detailed reports and analytics helped us make data-driven decisions for optimizing our workforce.
cons: While Desklog provided many benefits, there were a few areas where we felt improvements could be made. Firstly, the mobile app could have been more intuitive and user-friendly. Some of our employees found it a bit challenging to navigate. Secondly, it would have been helpful to have more customization options for reports and dashboards to tailor the software to our specific needs. Lastly, although customer support was generally responsive, quicker response times during critical issues would have been appreciated.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Well-developed with intuitive monitoring tool

cons: Desklog could add more features for micro monitoring

description: In conclusion, your healthcare company's time tracking software project has been a great success. We are thrilled with its results, and I would strongly recommend it to any organization looking to improve their time tracking processes. Thank you once again for your excellent work.

The author commends Martin's team for being professional, knowledgeable, and detail-oriented throughout the project, as well as being responsive to feedback and concerns. The author is extremely satisfied with the work that has been delivered and is looking forward to future opportunities to work together.
